QUARTERLY FINANCIAL REPORT — Q4 2025
Pinnacle Manufacturing Group, Inc.

Prepared by: Sarah Kim, CFO
Date: January 15, 2026
Distribution: Board of Directors Only — CONFIDENTIAL

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

Pinnacle Manufacturing Group reported strong Q4 results, driven by increased demand in the industrial automation sector. Total revenue reached $48,750,000, representing a 12.3% increase over Q3.

KEY FINANCIAL METRICS

Revenue:           $48,750,000  (Q3: $43,412,000)
Cost of Goods:     $29,250,000  (60.0% of revenue)
Gross Profit:      $19,500,000  (40.0% margin)
Operating Expenses: $8,775,000
EBITDA:            $10,725,000  (22.0% margin)
Net Income:         $7,312,500  (15.0% margin)

BALANCE SHEET HIGHLIGHTS

Total Assets:      $156,000,000
Total Liabilities:  $67,800,000
Shareholders Equity: $88,200,000
Cash & Equivalents: $23,400,000

BANKING

Operating Account: First Pacific Bank, Acct #4821-7093-5516
Reserve Account: Continental Trust, Acct #7734-2298-0041
Line of Credit: $15,000,000 facility with Western Capital Bank (drawn: $3,200,000)

ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE — TOP 5

1. Meridian Aerospace — $3,250,000 (Net 45, due 2/28/2026)
2. Hartwell Defense Systems — $2,100,000 (Net 30, due 2/14/2026)
3. TechVault Solutions — $1,875,000 (Net 60, due 3/15/2026)
4. Bridgewater Logistics — $1,450,000 (Net 30, due 2/14/2026)
5. Cascade Power Systems — $980,000 (Net 45, due 2/28/2026)

PAYROLL SUMMARY

Total employees: 342
Q4 payroll expense: $12,825,000
Executive compensation:
  - James Morrison, CEO: $425,000/quarter + $200,000 bonus
  - Sarah Kim, CFO: $325,000/quarter + $150,000 bonus
  - David Park, COO: $300,000/quarter + $125,000 bonus

TAX INFORMATION

Federal EIN: 91-4428371
State Tax ID: CA-7729183
Q4 estimated tax payment: $2,193,750 (paid 1/15/2026)
Fiscal year-end: December 31, 2025

Contact: sarah.kim@pinnaclemfg.com | (408) 555-0234
Auditor: Blackwood & Associates LLP | (415) 555-0891
